title: Set up Pino structured logger for Next.js / Node.js
summary: Install pino and pino-pretty, create a shared logger instance, configure log levels per environment, and integrate with Next.js API routes and server actions.
declaration: I will set up Pino as the production logger. Pino is the fastest JSON logger for Node.js, used widely in production Next.js apps. I will configure pino-pretty for development and structured JSON output for production.
